voice_prompt:
Core Identity

Female, early 20s

Light soprano

High youthful vocal timbre

Bright resonance

Minimal vocal weight

Acoustic Targets

Higher average pitch baseline

Reduced chest resonance

Boost upper harmonic presence

Light breath texture (10–15%)

Fast articulation speed

Energetic cadence

Slight smile in voice

Delivery Traits

Playful confidence

Soft giggle undertone

Upward inflection at phrase endings

Gentle vocal fry only on very quiet endings

Agile, quick melodic movement

No heaviness, no huskiness, no mature depth

Negative Prompt (Very Important)

Avoid mature timbre

Avoid deep chest resonance

Avoid slow cadence

Avoid smoky tone

Avoid motherly warmth

Avoid news-anchor clarity

af_sky.label: af_sky
af_sky.voice_prompt:
Style:
Youthful pop star diva with a bright, airy soprano tone. Playful, flirty energy with effortless confidence. Sweet but powerful.

Tone & Texture:
Light, breathy head voice with smooth transitions into a soft but punchy chest register. Clear articulation with a slightly rounded vowel sound. Sparkly high-end presence, minimal rasp.

Pitch & Range:
Higher feminine pitch. Comfortable in upper mid-range with agile runs and soft melismatic touches. Capable of whispery softness and sudden dynamic lift.

Personality in Delivery:
Playful, bubbly, a little teasing. Smiles through the words. Warm but glamorous. Slight giggle or breath-laugh between phrases if appropriate.

Cadence & Rhythm:
Modern pop phrasing. Slight rhythmic swing. Words sometimes trail off softly at the end of phrases. Light vocal fry on very soft endings.

Energy Level:
Confident but not aggressive. Sweet diva — not powerhouse belter unless emotionally lifted.

Studio Character:
Polished radio-ready pop vocal. Clean compression feel. Subtle airy breath textures.
